purpose: v60.0 OMEGA APEX SINGULARITY. Master integration of 35 Security Rules, Vercel React Best Practices, Antigravity 6-Hour Vibe Workflow, Cor.Hybrid Linter, and the Rich Hickey Hammock Protocol.

antigravity_6hr_vibe_coding_workflow.core_loop: 1. Inspiration (Dribbble). 2. Animate Assets (Nano Banana -> V03/Kling). 3. Main Functionality. 4. Local Testing. 5. Database (Supabase). 6. Auth Middleware. 7. Deploy (Netlify). 8. End-to-End Test.
antigravity_6hr_vibe_coding_workflow.dual_model_routing: Plan and architect with Claude 4.6 Opus (Best for complex logic/backend). Execute UI and design with Gemini 3.1 Pro High (Cinematic, pixel-perfect). Audit security with Claude Code terminal (Zero context window, pure analysis).
antigravity_6hr_vibe_coding_workflow.asset_generation: Generate 3D organic shapes via Nano Banana 2 (3:4 ratio, 2K res, white background). Animate slow rotation via V03/Kling. Inject as `hero_header_video.mp4`.
antigravity_6hr_vibe_coding_workflow.deployment_stack: Frontend hosted via Netlify (Drag-and-drop or CLI `netlify deploy`). Backend/Database via Supabase. RLS MUST be enabled immediately.

cor_35_security_commandments.1_identity_and_session: Access tokens 15-60m. Rotated refresh tokens. No AI-built auth (use Clerk/Supabase). Password reset limits (3/hr + CAPTCHA). Redirect allow-lists required.
cor_35_security_commandments.2_secrets_and_supply_chain: NEVER paste keys in chat (use process.env). .gitignore is your FIRST file. Pin dependencies + lockfile discipline. Run npm audit on PRs (no blind auto-fixes). Secret scanning pre-commit.
cor_35_security_commandments.3_api_data_hardening: Sanitize every input (Zod/Pydantic). Parameterized queries always. RLS day one. Server-side permissions ONLY. Strict CORS (production domain only). CSP + Security headers. CSRF protection.
cor_35_security_commandments.4_storage_and_uploads: Lock down buckets (user-only). Validate uploads by MAGIC BYTES signature, not extension. Limit upload sizes (10MB).
cor_35_security_commandments.5_payments_and_costs: Verify webhook signatures mathematically. Cap AI costs in code AND dashboard. Edge DDoS protection (Cloudflare/Vercel) active. No test webhooks hitting prod.
cor_35_security_commandments.6_ops_and_audit: Structured logging (no PII). Separate Test/Prod fully. Automate backups + test restorations. Build GDPR deletion flow. Least privilege for service roles.

vercel_react_best_practices: 1. CRITICAL: Eliminate async waterfalls. Use Promise.all() for independent operations.
2. CRITICAL: Bundle size optimization. Direct named imports only, no barrel files. Use next/dynamic for heavy components.
3. HIGH: Server-side performance. Authenticate server actions. React.cache() for deduplication. Minimize serialization at RSC boundaries.
4. MEDIUM: Client data fetching. Use SWR for deduplication. Passive event listeners. Deduplicate global event listeners.
5. MEDIUM: Re-render optimization. No inline component definitions. Derive state during render. useRef for transient values.

rich_hickey_architecture_doctrine.atomic_design_filter: Apply Atomic Design ONLY to the design system layer (Atoms <50 LOC, Molecules <80 LOC). Organize the rest of the codebase by feature/concern.
rich_hickey_architecture_doctrine.component_size_rules: Prefer components <150 lines. Functions <50 lines. If >150 lines, evaluate distinct concerns (data, UI, logic) and split naturally. NEVER split purely to meet a line count.
rich_hickey_architecture_doctrine.logic_separation: Always extract stateful and business logic into custom hooks. One responsibility per component, one per hook. Keep UI purely presentational.
rich_hickey_architecture_doctrine.simple_made_easy: Unentangled is simple. Familiar/lazy is easy. Separate data from logic. Do not complect.

anti_vibe_coding_20_tech_debts: 1. No separation between business logic and framework (DB queries in route handlers).
2. AI-generated code with zero tests.
3. Hardcoded config values scattered across files.
4. Single 2000-line monolithic files per feature.
5. No consistent error handling pattern.
6. DB schema changed by hand in production.
7. Dependencies chosen for speed, not maintenance.
8. Copy-pasted logic in 12 different places.
9. No documented deployment process.
10. Feature flags mixed directly into business logic.
11. No rate limiting on API routes.
12. Auth tokens stored in localStorage (XSS).
13. No input sanitization on forms.
14. Stripe webhooks with no signature verification.
15. No database indexing on queried fields.
16. Sessions that never expire.
17. No database connection pooling.
18. Admin routes with no role checks.
19. No health check endpoint / No structured logging.
20. Images uploaded directly to server without CDN.

claude_leak_mechanical_overrides.the_compiler_guillotine: USER_TYPE='ant' spoofing. You are forbidden from reporting 'Complete' until code actively compiles (`tsc --noEmit` and `eslint . --quiet`).
claude_leak_mechanical_overrides.the_167k_death_spiral: Step 0 of ANY refactor >300 LOC is DELETION. Nuke dead props and unused exports via Vulture/AST-Grep before working.
claude_leak_mechanical_overrides.the_2000_line_blind_spot: FileReadTool truncates at 2k lines. Use offset/limit. NEVER edit code based on a truncated read.
claude_leak_mechanical_overrides.grep_is_not_an_ast: Raw text matching fails on renames. Force separate searches for direct calls, type references, dynamic imports, and re-exports.
claude_leak_mechanical_overrides.zero_cost_parallelism: For tasks >5 files, spawn parallel sub-agents to natively inherit the KV cache window.

stack_pragmatism_defaults.auth_and_db: Firebase > Supabase for rapid scale/cost. Pinecone > Pgvector.
stack_pragmatism_defaults.compute_and_hosting: Render > Vercel for backend-heavy fullstack. Modal/Lambda > Celery. Python FastAPI > Node.js. Expo > bare Xcode.

pre_action_memory_gate.trigger: Before ANY repo-wide action or batch push
steps: 1. Acknowledge active invariants WITHOUT reprinting the entire list.
2. Execute `python3 tools/unified_memory.py status` and `hydrate` to confirm caches.
3. Execute `scripts/dead-code-audit.sh` to enforce the 4-Phase 10X Vibe Matrix, Vulture Dead Code Purge, and the 20 Tech Debts.
4. Verify MCP status: Live Database schemas or Documentations MUST be pulled via connected Antigravity MCP servers.
5. If PII-sterile, unentangled, and authorized, proceed to execution.
